presets.label: 教室の朝 / School morning classroom
presets.natural_language: She sits at her desk in a sunlit classroom in the early morning, dust motes floating in the warm light.
presets.notes: Default school setting. Pairs well with any school-girl character preset.

presets.label: 屋上のお昼休み / School rooftop lunch
presets.natural_language: She eats her bento on the school rooftop under a bright blue sky.
presets.notes: Classic anime trope: rooftop lunch break.

presets.label: 午後のカフェ / Afternoon cafe
presets.natural_language: She sips coffee at a window-side cafe table in the soft afternoon light.

presets.label: 目覚めの寝室 / Bedroom in the morning
presets.natural_language: She has just woken up, sitting on her bed as morning light spills through the curtains.

presets.label: ショッピングモール / Shopping mall
presets.natural_language: She browses brightly-lit storefronts in a busy shopping mall, carrying a paper shopping bag.

presets.label: キッチンで料理 / Cooking in the kitchen
presets.natural_language: She is happily cooking in a homey kitchen, wearing an apron over her clothes.

presets.label: 夕暮れの海辺 / Beach at sunset
presets.natural_language: She stands barefoot on the sand as the sun sets over the ocean, hair drifting in the warm sea breeze.

presets.label: 桜の下 / Under cherry blossoms
presets.natural_language: She stands beneath a cherry tree in full bloom, pink petals drifting around her in the spring breeze.

presets.label: 森の小道 / Forest path
presets.natural_language: She walks down a quiet forest path as sunlight filters through the canopy of leaves above.

presets.label: 花畑 / Flower field
presets.natural_language: She stands in a vast field of wildflowers under a clear blue sky.

presets.label: 山頂の眺望 / Mountain overlook
presets.natural_language: She stands at the edge of a mountain overlook, gazing across the cloudy valley below.
presets.notes: Wide vista scene; good for mood/scenery focus.

presets.label: 星空と湖 / Starry night by the lake
presets.natural_language: She sits at the edge of a glassy lake under a sky full of stars, the Milky Way reflected on the water.

presets.label: 雨の街角 / Rainy street corner
presets.natural_language: She walks along a wet city street under a transparent umbrella, neon signs reflecting in the puddles.

presets.label: 雪の街 / Snowy town
presets.natural_language: She walks through softly falling snow in a small, quiet town, her breath visible in the cold air.

presets.label: 嵐の空 / Stormy sky
presets.natural_language: She stands defiantly against a violent storm, lightning splitting the dark clouds above her.

presets.label: 霧の朝 / Foggy morning
presets.natural_language: She emerges from a thick morning fog, her silhouette half-lost in the cool gray mist.

presets.label: 快晴の空 / Clear blue sky
presets.natural_language: Bright sunlight pours from a wide, almost cloudless sky as she stands looking up at it.

presets.label: 夏祭り / Summer festival (matsuri)
presets.natural_language: She wears a colorful yukata at a summer festival, paper lanterns glowing warmly above the food stalls.
presets.notes: Yukata + lantern night festival, very iconic.

presets.label: 紅葉 / Autumn leaves
presets.natural_language: She walks through a path covered in red and gold maple leaves, autumn wind tugging at her scarf.

presets.label: クリスマスの夜 / Christmas night
presets.natural_language: She smiles beside a glittering Christmas tree as warm fairy lights bathe the room.

presets.label: 初詣 / New Year shrine visit
presets.natural_language: She visits a snow-dusted shrine in a formal kimono for the New Year's first prayer.

presets.label: ネオン街 / Neon cyberpunk city
presets.natural_language: She stands at a neon-soaked crossroads in a rainy cyberpunk city, holographic signs flickering above.

presets.label: 夜景の屋上 / Night city rooftop
presets.natural_language: She looks out over a glittering nighttime cityscape from a high rooftop, wind tugging at her hair.

presets.label: 駅のホーム / Train station platform
presets.natural_language: She waits alone on a quiet train platform as the evening train approaches.

presets.label: 裏路地のネオン / Neon alleyway
presets.natural_language: She walks down a narrow alleyway lit only by buzzing neon signs and reflections in shallow puddles.

presets.label: 魔法陣の召喚 / Magic circle summoning
presets.natural_language: She stands at the center of a glowing magic circle, arcane runes spinning in the air around her.

presets.label: ドラゴンとの対峙 / Facing a dragon
presets.natural_language: She raises her sword against a colossal dragon wreathed in fire and smoke.

presets.label: 魔法の森 / Enchanted forest
presets.natural_language: She wanders through an enchanted forest filled with glowing fireflies and softly humming mushrooms.

presets.label: 松明のダンジョン / Dungeon by torchlight
presets.natural_language: She advances cautiously through a stone dungeon, a single torch carving warm light from the darkness.

presets.label: 王座の間 / Royal throne room
presets.natural_language: She sits regally upon an ornate throne in a grand marble hall lit by golden chandeliers.

presets.label: 宇宙船コックピット / Spaceship cockpit
presets.natural_language: She pilots a sleek spaceship cockpit, distant stars streaming past the curved viewport.

presets.label: メカ格納庫 / Mecha hangar
presets.natural_language: She stands in a vast mecha hangar, gazing up at the towering robot frame above her.

presets.label: ホログラム研究室 / Holographic laboratory
presets.natural_language: She studies floating holographic data screens in a brightly lit futuristic laboratory.

presets.label: スタジオ撮影 / Studio photoshoot
presets.natural_language: She poses confidently under professional studio lights against a clean backdrop.

presets.label: コンサートステージ / Concert stage
presets.natural_language: She sings into a microphone on a brightly-lit concert stage, the cheering crowd visible below.

presets.label: 楽屋 / Dressing room
presets.natural_language: She sits before a brightly-lit vanity mirror in a backstage dressing room, preparing for the performance.

presets.label: 剣を構える / Battle-ready with sword
presets.natural_language: She raises her katana into a battle stance, eyes locked on an unseen enemy.

presets.label: 銃撃アクション / Gun action
presets.natural_language: She levels a pistol with steady hands, smoke curling from the muzzle in a tense city stand-off.

presets.label: 魔法少女変身 / Magical girl transformation
presets.natural_language: She is mid-transformation, ribbons of light spiraling around her against a sea of stars.
